codeReview.summary: Reviewed feature metadata, handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit 87c3279c. The diff correctly replaces targeted hardcoded colors in Routines and RoutineDetail with design-token CSS variables and removes the specified shadow classes; Goals/GoalDetail remained unchanged and already contain no hardcoded Tailwind palette/shadow classes in the reviewed commit snapshot. No correctness, regression, or contract-compliance defects were found in the implemented code.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The gui-worker procedure requires running TUI tests even for GUI-only design-token features, but this feature contract requires UI tests plus agent-browser verification. The worker followed the feature contract and did not run TUI tests while handoff metadata still marked followedProcedure=true, indicating a procedure/contract mismatch that should be reconciled.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/gui-worker/SKILL.md:56-59 requires `pnpm exec vitest run packages/orchestrator-tui/ --max-workers=3`; features.json:574-577 for gui-design-expansion-cluster1 requires UI tests + agent-browser; handoff 2026-04-03T23-02-17-223Z__gui-design-expansion-cluster1__eeb8f5f0-cfbc-43aa-b1ac-5af55236ba2a.json:16-22 shows only UI tests and typecheck.

summary: Feature gui-design-expansion-cluster1 passes scrutiny review: implementation aligns with the cluster-1 design-system requirements and reviewed diff shows no blocking or non-blocking defects.
